changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.comment: Add additional dictionary categories for bacteriology tests

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.dictionary (id, is_active, dict_entry, lastupdated, dictionary_category_id, display_key, sort_order) SELECT nextval('clinlims.dictionary_seq'), 'Y', 'Négative', now(), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'CulureNRes' LIMIT 1), 'dictionary.negative', 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.dictionary d JOIN clinlims.dictionary_category dc ON d.dictionary_category_id = dc.id WHERE dc.name = 'CulureNRes' AND d.dict_entry = 'Négative' ); INSERT INTO clinlims.dictionary (id, is_active, dict_entry, lastupdated, dictionary_category_id, display_key, sort_order) SELECT nextval('clinlims.dictionary_seq'), 'Y', 'Positive', now(), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'CulureNRes' LIMIT 1), 'dictionary.positive', 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.dictionary d JOIN clinlims.dictionary_category dc ON d.dictionary_category_id = dc.id WHERE dc.name = 'CulureNRes' AND d.dict_entry = 'Positive' ); INSERT INTO clinlims.dictionary (id, is_active, dict_entry, lastupdated, dictionary_category_id, display_key, sort_order) SELECT nextval('clinlims.dictionary_seq'), 'Y', 'Contaminée', now(), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'CulureNRes' LIMIT 1), 'dictionary.contaminee', 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.dictionary d JOIN clinlims.dictionary_category dc ON d.dictionary_category_id = dc.id WHERE dc.name = 'CulureNRes' AND d.dict_entry = 'Contaminée' );

changeSet.author: pkomena
pkomena
pkomena
changeSet.sql: WITH category AS ( SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'Bacteriology Culture Gonorrhoeae' LIMIT 1 ) INSERT INTO clinlims.dictionary (id, is_active, dict_entry, lastupdated, dictionary_category_id, display_key, sort_order) SELECT nextval('clinlims.dictionary_seq'), 'Y', entry, now(), (SELECT id FROM category), display, sort_ord FROM (VALUES ('Négative', 'dictionary.bacterio.culture.gono.negative', 1), ('Positive', 'dictionary.bacterio.culture.gono.positive', 2), ('Neisseria gonorrhoeae Positive', 'dictionary.bacterio.culture.gono.ng_pos', 3), ('Neisseria gonorrhoeae Négative', 'dictionary.bacterio.culture.gono.ng_neg', 4) ) AS data(entry, display, sort_ord) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.dictionary d JOIN category c ON d.dictionary_category_id = c.id WHERE d.dict_entry = data.entry );

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.sql: WITH category AS ( SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'Bacteriology Capsule' LIMIT 1 ) INSERT INTO clinlims.dictionary (id, is_active, dict_entry, lastupdated, dictionary_category_id, display_key, sort_order) SELECT nextval('clinlims.dictionary_seq'), 'Y', entry, now(), (SELECT id FROM category), 'dictionary.bacteriology.capsule.' || lower(replace(replace(entry, ' ', '_'), 'é', 'e')), sort_ord FROM (VALUES ('Capsulé', 1), ('Non Capsulé', 2) ) AS data(entry, sort_ord) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.dictionary d JOIN category c ON d.dictionary_category_id = c.id WHERE d.dict_entry = data.entry );

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.comment: Add localizations for vaginal secretion tests

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.comment: Add localizations for urethral secretion tests

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.comment: Add localizations for others bacterio sample type

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.comment: Create all tests for Sécrétions vaginales with conditional logic

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.comment: Map dictionary values to vaginal secretion tests as possible results

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.comment: Create sampletype_test mappings for Sécrétions vaginales
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.sampletype_test (id, sample_type_id, test_id) SELECT nextval('sample_type_test_seq'), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE description = 'Sécrétions vaginales' LIMIT 1), t.id FROM clinlims.test t WHERE t.name IN ( 'Macroscopie - Col - Leucorrhées', 'Macroscopie - Col - Abondance', 'Macroscopie - Col - Aspect', 'Macroscopie - Col - Couleur', 'Macroscopie - Col - Autre', 'Macroscopie - Muqueuse vaginale - Leucorrhées', 'Macroscopie - Muqueuse vaginale - Abondance', 'Macroscopie - Muqueuse vaginale - Aspect', 'Macroscopie - Muqueuse vaginale - Couleur', 'Macroscopie - Muqueuse vaginale - Autre', 'Macroscopie - Vulve - Leucorrhées', 'Macroscopie - Vulve - Abondance', 'Macroscopie - Vulve - Aspect', 'Macroscopie - Vulve - Couleur', 'Macroscopie - Vulve - Autre', 'Culture - Sécrétions vaginales', 'Culture - Col' ) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.comment: Create all tests for flora count with conditional logic

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.comment: Create tests for uretral secretion with conditional logic

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.comment: Create tests for uretral secretion with conditional logic

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.comment: Create sampletype_test mappings for Sécrétions urétrales
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.sampletype_test (id, sample_type_id, test_id) SELECT nextval('sample_type_test_seq'), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE description = 'Sécrétions urétrales' LIMIT 1), t.id FROM clinlims.test t WHERE t.name IN ( 'Macroscopie - Ecoulement', 'Macroscopie - Gland - Abondance', 'Macroscopie - Gland - Aspect', 'Macroscopie - Gland - Couleur', 'Macroscopie - Gland - Autre', 'Culture - Sécrétions urétrales' ) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.comment: Create sampletype_test mappings for other bacteriology sample types
changeSet.sql: WITH sample_types AS ( SELECT id, description FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE trim(description) IN ( 'Urines', 'Liquide ponction', 'Sperme', 'Sang(hémoculture)', 'Crachat/Expectoration', 'Matériels(Prothèse,Sonde,Stérilet)', 'LCR', 'Pus', 'Selles' ) ), tests AS ( SELECT id, name FROM clinlims.test WHERE name IN ( 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Bactéries - Nombre de flore', 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Bactéries - Type de Gram', 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Bactéries - Mode de regroupement', 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Bactéries - Autre caractère', 'Macroscopie - Ecoulement', 'Macroscopie - Gland - Abondance', 'Macroscopie - Gland - Aspect', 'Macroscopie - Gland - Couleur', 'Macroscopie - Gland - Autre', 'Culture - Sécrétions urétrales', 'Microscopie - Etat frais Quantitatif - Hématies', 'Microscopie - Etat frais Quantitatif - Leucocytes', 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Giemsa - Polynucléaires', 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Giemsa - Lymphocytes', 'Culture' ) ), pairs AS ( SELECT st.id AS sample_type_id, t.id AS test_id FROM sample_types st CROSS JOIN tests t WHERE -- Tous les tests pour tous les types sauf Selles (st.description <> 'Selles') OR -- Selles uniquement pour le test "Culture" (st.description = 'Selles' AND t.name = 'Culture') ) INSERT INTO clinlims.sampletype_test (id, sample_type_id, test_id) SELECT nextval('sample_type_test_seq'), p.sample_type_id, p.test_id FROM pairs p ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.test_result (id, test_id, tst_rslt_type, value, lastupdated, sort_order, is_active) SELECT nextval('clinlims.test_result_seq'), t.id, 'D', d.dict_id, now(), v.sort_order, true FROM (VALUES ('0', 10), ('1', 20), ('2', 30), ('>=3', 40) ) AS v(dict_entry, sort_order) JOIN clinlims.test t ON lower(trim(t.name)) = lower(trim('Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Bactéries - Nombre de flore')) JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT MIN(d.id) AS dict_id FROM clinlims.dictionary d WHERE lower(trim(d.dict_entry)) = lower(trim(v.dict_entry)) AND d.dictionary_category_id IS NULL ) d ON true ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.test_result (id, test_id, tst_rslt_type, value, lastupdated, sort_order, is_active) SELECT nextval('clinlims.test_result_seq'), t.id, 'D', d.dict_id, now(), v.sort_order, true FROM (VALUES ('Bacilles Gram négatif', 10), ('Bacilles Gram positif', 20), ('Cocci Gram négatif', 30), ('Cocci Gram positif', 40), ('Coccobacilles Gram négatif', 50), ('Coccobacilles Gram positif', 60) ) AS v(dict_entry, sort_order) JOIN clinlims.test t ON lower(trim(t.name)) = lower(trim('Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Bactéries - Type de Gram')) JOIN clinlims.dictionary_category dc ON dc.name = 'Bacteriology Gram Type' JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT MIN(d.id) AS dict_id FROM clinlims.dictionary d WHERE lower(trim(d.dict_entry)) = lower(trim(v.dict_entry)) AND d.dictionary_category_id = dc.id ) d ON true ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.test_result (id, test_id, tst_rslt_type, value, lastupdated, sort_order, is_active) SELECT nextval('clinlims.test_result_seq'), t.id, 'D', d.dict_id, now(), v.sort_order, true FROM (VALUES ('Isolées', 10), ('Amas', 20), ('Courte chainette', 30), ('Longue chainette', 40), ('Grappe', 50), ('Tétrade', 60), ('Diplo', 70) ) AS v(dict_entry, sort_order) JOIN clinlims.test t ON lower(trim(t.name)) = lower(trim('Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Bactéries - Mode de regroupement')) JOIN clinlims.dictionary_category dc ON dc.name = 'Bacteriology Grouping Mode' JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT MIN(d.id) AS dict_id FROM clinlims.dictionary d WHERE lower(trim(d.dict_entry)) = lower(trim(v.dict_entry)) AND d.dictionary_category_id = dc.id ) d ON true ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.test_result (id, test_id, tst_rslt_type, value, lastupdated, sort_order, is_active) SELECT nextval('clinlims.test_result_seq'), t.id, 'D', d.dict_id, now(), v.sort_order, true FROM (VALUES ('Capsulé', 10), ('Non Capsulé', 20) ) AS v(dict_entry, sort_order) JOIN clinlims.test t ON lower(trim(t.name)) = lower(trim('Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Bactéries - Autre caractère')) JOIN clinlims.dictionary_category dc ON dc.name = 'Bacteriology Capsule' JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT MIN(d.id) AS dict_id FROM clinlims.dictionary d WHERE lower(trim(d.dict_entry)) = lower(trim(v.dict_entry)) AND d.dictionary_category_id = dc.id ) d ON true ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.test_result (id, test_id, tst_rslt_type, value, lastupdated, sort_order, is_active) SELECT nextval('clinlims.test_result_seq'), t.id, 'D', d.dict_id, now(), v.sort_order, true FROM (VALUES ('Présence', 10), ('Absence', 20) ) AS v(dict_entry, sort_order) JOIN clinlims.test t ON lower(trim(t.name)) = lower(trim('Macroscopie - Ecoulement')) JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT MIN(d.id) AS dict_id FROM clinlims.dictionary d WHERE lower(trim(d.dict_entry)) = lower(trim(v.dict_entry)) ) d ON true ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.test_result (id, test_id, tst_rslt_type, value, lastupdated, sort_order, is_active) SELECT nextval('clinlims.test_result_seq'), t.id, 'D', d.dict_id, now(), v.sort_order, true FROM (VALUES ('Minime', 10), ('Moyen', 20), ('Abondante', 30) ) AS v(dict_entry, sort_order) JOIN clinlims.test t ON lower(trim(t.name)) = lower(trim('Macroscopie - Gland - Abondance')) JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT MIN(d.id) AS dict_id FROM clinlims.dictionary d WHERE lower(trim(d.dict_entry)) = lower(trim(v.dict_entry)) AND d.dictionary_category_id IS NULL ) d ON true ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.test_result (id, test_id, tst_rslt_type, value, lastupdated, sort_order, is_active) SELECT nextval('clinlims.test_result_seq'), t.id, 'D', d.dict_id, now(), v.sort_order, true FROM (VALUES ('Purulent', 10), ('Translucide', 20) ) AS v(dict_entry, sort_order) JOIN clinlims.test t ON lower(trim(t.name)) = lower(trim('Macroscopie - Gland - Aspect')) JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT MIN(d.id) AS dict_id FROM clinlims.dictionary d WHERE lower(trim(d.dict_entry)) = lower(trim(v.dict_entry)) AND d.dictionary_category_id IS NULL ) d ON true ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.test_result (id, test_id, tst_rslt_type, value, lastupdated, sort_order, is_active) SELECT nextval('clinlims.test_result_seq'), t.id, 'D', d.dict_id, now(), v.sort_order, true FROM (VALUES ('Rougeatre', 10), ('Blanchatre', 20), ('Verdatre', 30), ('Jaunatre', 40), ('Grisatre', 50) ) AS v(dict_entry, sort_order) JOIN clinlims.test t ON lower(trim(t.name)) = lower(trim('Macroscopie - Gland - Couleur')) JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT MIN(d.id) AS dict_id FROM clinlims.dictionary d WHERE lower(trim(d.dict_entry)) = lower(trim(v.dict_entry)) AND d.dictionary_category_id IS NULL ) d ON true ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.test_result (id, test_id, tst_rslt_type, value, lastupdated, sort_order, is_active) SELECT nextval('clinlims.test_result_seq'), t.id, 'D', d.dict_id, now(), v.sort_order, true FROM (VALUES ('Fetide', 10), ('Inodore', 20) ) AS v(dict_entry, sort_order) JOIN clinlims.test t ON lower(trim(t.name)) = lower(trim('Macroscopie - Gland - Autre')) JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT MIN(d.id) AS dict_id FROM clinlims.dictionary d WHERE lower(trim(d.dict_entry)) = lower(trim(v.dict_entry)) AND d.dictionary_category_id IS NULL ) d ON true ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.test_result (id, test_id, tst_rslt_type, value, lastupdated, sort_order, is_active) SELECT nextval('clinlims.test_result_seq'), t.id, 'D', d.dict_id, now(), v.sort_order, true FROM (VALUES ('Négative', 10), ('Positive', 20), ('Neisseria gonorrhoeae Positive', 30), ('Neisseria gonorrhoeae Négative', 40) ) AS v(dict_entry, sort_order) JOIN clinlims.test t ON lower(trim(t.name)) = lower(trim('Culture - Sécrétions urétrales')) JOIN clinlims.dictionary_category dc ON dc.name = 'Bacteriology Culture Gonorrhoeae' JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT MIN(d.id) AS dict_id FROM clinlims.dictionary d WHERE lower(trim(d.dict_entry)) = lower(trim(v.dict_entry)) AND d.dictionary_category_id = dc.id ) d ON true ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.test_result (id, test_id, tst_rslt_type, value, lastupdated, sort_order, is_active) SELECT nextval('clinlims.test_result_seq'), t.id, 'D', d.dict_id, now(), v.sort_order, true FROM (VALUES ('Négative', 10), ('Positive', 20), ('Contaminée', 30) ) AS v(dict_entry, sort_order) JOIN clinlims.test t ON lower(trim(t.name)) = lower(trim('Culture')) JOIN clinlims.dictionary_category dc ON dc.name = 'CulureNRes' JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT MIN(d.id) AS dict_id FROM clinlims.dictionary d WHERE lower(trim(d.dict_entry)) = lower(trim(v.dict_entry)) AND d.dictionary_category_id = dc.id ) d ON true ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.sql: WITH mappings AS ( -- test_name, dict_entry, sort_order SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('Microscopie - Etat frais Quantitatif - Hématies',10), ('Microscopie - Etat frais Quantitatif - Leucocytes',20), ('Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Giemsa - Polynucléaires',30), ('Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Giemsa - Lymphocytes',40) ) AS v(test_name, sort_order) ) INSERT INTO clinlims.test_result (id, test_id, tst_rslt_type, value, lastupdated, sort_order, is_active) SELECT nextval('clinlims.test_result_seq'), t.id, 'N', null, now(), m.sort_order, true FROM mappings m JOIN clinlims.test t ON lower(trim(t.name)) = lower(trim(m.test_name)) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: CIV developer Group
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.result_limits(id, test_id, test_result_type_id,min_age, max_age, gender, low_normal, high_normal, low_valid, high_valid, lastupdated, normal_dictionary_id, always_validate) VALUES (nextval('result_limits_seq'),(select id from test where description = 'Microscopie - Etat frais Quantitatif - Hématies'), 4,0,'Infinity',null,'0','100','0','100',now(),null,'f'), (nextval('result_limits_seq'),(select id from test where description = 'Microscopie - Etat frais Quantitatif - Leucocytes'), 4,0,'Infinity',null,'0','100','0','100',now(),null,'f'), (nextval('result_limits_seq'),(select id from test where description = 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Giemsa - Polynucléaires'), 4,0,'Infinity',null,'0','100','0','100',now(),null,'f'), (nextval('result_limits_seq'),(select id from test where description = 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Giemsa - Lymphocytes'), 4,0,'Infinity',null,'0','100','0','100',now(),null,'f');

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.result_limits( id, test_id, test_result_type_id, min_age, max_age, gender, low_normal, high_normal, low_valid, high_valid, lastupdated, normal_dictionary_id, always_validate ) SELECT nextval('result_limits_seq'), t.id, 2, 0, 'Infinity', NULL, 'Infinity', 'Infinity', 'Infinity', 'Infinity', now(), NULL, 'f' FROM clinlims.test t WHERE t.name IN ( 'Macroscopie - Col - Leucorrhées', 'Macroscopie - Col - Abondance', 'Macroscopie - Col - Aspect', 'Macroscopie - Col - Couleur', 'Macroscopie - Col - Autre', 'Macroscopie - Muqueuse vaginale - Leucorrhées', 'Macroscopie - Muqueuse vaginale - Abondance', 'Macroscopie - Muqueuse vaginale - Aspect', 'Macroscopie - Muqueuse vaginale - Couleur', 'Macroscopie - Muqueuse vaginale - Autre', 'Macroscopie - Vulve - Leucorrhées', 'Macroscopie - Vulve - Abondance', 'Macroscopie - Vulve - Aspect', 'Macroscopie - Vulve - Couleur', 'Macroscopie - Vulve - Autre', 'Culture - Sécrétions Vaginales', 'Culture - Col', 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Bactéries - Nombre de flore', 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Bactéries - Type de Gram', 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Bactéries - Mode de regroupement', 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Bactéries - Autre caractère', 'Macroscopie - Ecoulement', 'Macroscopie - Gland - Abondance', 'Macroscopie - Gland - Aspect', 'Macroscopie - Gland - Couleur', 'Macroscopie - Gland - Autre', 'Culture - Sécrétions urétrales', 'Culture' ) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM clinlims.test_result tr WHERE tr.test_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE name = 'Macroscopie - Gland - Couleur')

INSERT INTO clinlims.test_result (id, test_id, tst_rslt_type, value, lastupdated, sort_order, is_active) SELECT nextval('clinlims.test_result_seq'), t.id, 'D', d.dict_id, now(), v.sort_order, true FROM (VALUES ('Rougeatre', 10), ('Blanchatre', 20), ('Verdatre', 30), ('Jaunatre', 40), ('Grisatre', 50) ) AS v(dict_entry, sort_order) JOIN clinlims.test t ON lower(trim(t.name)) = lower(trim('Macroscopie - Gland - Couleur')) JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT MIN(d.id) AS dict_id FROM clinlims.dictionary d WHERE lower(trim(d.dict_entry)) = lower(trim(v.dict_entry)) ) d ON true ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM clinlims.test_result tr WHERE tr.test_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE name = 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Bactéries - Mode de regroupement')

INSERT INTO clinlims.test_result (id, test_id, tst_rslt_type, value, lastupdated, sort_order, is_active) SELECT nextval('clinlims.test_result_seq'), t.id, 'D', d.dict_id, now(), v.sort_order, true FROM (VALUES ('Isolées', 10), ('Amas', 20), ('Courte chainette', 30), ('Longue chainette', 40), ('Grappe', 50), ('Tétrade', 60), ('Diplo', 70) ) AS v(dict_entry, sort_order) JOIN clinlims.test t ON lower(trim(t.name)) = lower(trim('Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Bactéries - Mode de regroupement')) JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT MIN(d.id) AS dict_id FROM clinlims.dictionary d WHERE lower(trim(d.dict_entry)) = lower(trim(v.dict_entry)) ) d ON true ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.sampletype_test (id, test_id, sample_type_id) SELECT nextval('sample_type_test_seq'), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE name = 'Culture' LIMIT 1) AS test_id, id AS sample_type_id FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE description IN ( 'Liquide de ponction', 'Sang (hémoculture)','Matériels (Prothèse, Sonde, Stérilet)' );
